steps.text: A clock is a machine — it tells us the time.
It has a hand that moves to point at a number. Tap number 3 on the clock!
Because you tapped 3, the hand moved to 3. The clock is now showing three o'clock. You made it move! Now tap number 6. What do you think will happen to the hand?
Because you tapped 6, the hand moved all the way to 6. You are controlling the clock! Tap number 9 — then look at where the hand goes.
Because you tapped 9, the hand moved to 9. Every time you tap a number, the hand follows. Last — tap 12. That is where the clock starts every single day.
steps.feedback: The hand is back at the top. 12 is where the clock begins. Tap a number, the hand moves — that is the clock doing its job!
